name: MUD + Int5 MLP + BigramHash(10240) + SWA
blurb: Replaces Muon's Newton-Schulz iterations with MUD's triangular Gram preconditioning (arxiv:2603.17970). MUD1 costs ~12x fewer FLOPs than Muon5, yielding 1.3-2.6x throughput improvement. Combined with Int5 MLP quantization, BigramHash(10240), SWA, and sliding window eval.
